creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
see here:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/59235/
and herr:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2017-January/106845.html

If I added to the Makefile
CONFIGURE_ENV+= ac_cv_header_pugixml_hpp=no

so it will take the internal headers, it compiles without problems.

Cause I don't know it this solution is right.
